description_long: This is an L-shaped wooden couch with a continuous backrest and five distinct seat cushions upholstered in a deep red material. The frame is constructed from planks of wood with a visible grain, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The seat cushions are square, tufted, and evenly spaced along the main section, with an additional cushion forming the short leg of the L. The legs are blocky and made of the same wood as the frame, providing solid support. There are no visible armrests, and the backrest runs along the entire length and short side of the couch. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for public urban spaces such as parks or waiting areas.
description: L-shaped wooden couch with five red tufted seat cushions, a continuous wooden backrest, and block-style wooden legs. The design is rustic and functional, ideal for urban public seating.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the depth of the seat cushions and the short L extension with a single cushion.
description_view_1: Front angled view displaying the full length of the couch, all five seat cushions, and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the wooden frame, block legs, and the arrangement of the seat cushions along the main section.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the uninterrupted wooden backrest and the solid wood construction of the frame.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five square, red, tufted seat cushions are arranged in an L-shape, with four on the main section and one on the short extension; all cushions appear attached and integrated with no accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid red with visible tufting, creating a quilted, grid-like pattern on each seat cushion.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, short, block-style wooden legs matching the frame, providing a sturdy and simple base.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests are present; the couch features an open-ended design with only a continuous backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height wooden backrest running along both the main and short sections, integrated with the frame and lacking additional cushioning.
